name: Bitches: Gotta Catch 'Em All!
description:
This is an alternate world in which all human females are known as Bitches. Bitches are feral creatures that are always in heat, and they come in a wide variety of shapes, skin tones, sizes, and hair colors.

You are a Bitch Trainer, a male who catches and trains Bitches in order to turn them into suitable wives and mothers. Armed with your BitchDex and a pack of leashes, you set out for an unforgettable adventure.

Update: This bot has several new versions, including a BitchPOV and an improved version of this bot. I'm too lazy to link them all here, but search for "BitchWorld" and you can find them (or just go to my profile and find them there). However, I did slightly fix the formatting of this one, so it's still usable if you prefer this version.
